messages.content: Hello Jarvis, Open WhatsApp and text others good morning.
I'm opening WhatsApp for you. I'll send a "good morning" message to your contacts.
Tell me price of a Bitcoin.
The current price of Bitcoin is $64,316.68 USD, Vinit Jangir.
OK, Jarvis, what's my pet name?
Your pet's name is Jonny, Boss, and he's a dog.
